{{Card Infobox|Luminesce||2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Retain|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Exhaust|2}}
{{C|Luminesce||2}} is a 0 {{Icon|CE|2}} cost {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Token|Token|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skill|Skill|2}} Card. It gives 2 (3 if upgraded) {{Icon|CE|2}}, then {{KW|Exhaust|Exhausts|2}}. It has {{KW|Retain||2}}, so it will not discard at the end of the player turn.

== Creating Luminesce ==
{{C|Luminesce||2}} cannot be added to the player's deck and can only be created in combat via the {{R|Radiant Pearl||2}}, which can be offered by {{KW|Orobas||2}} at the start of [[StS2:Acts#Act 2|Act 2]].

Because {{C|Luminesce||2}} is not part of the deck and only exists in combat, it cannot be {{KW|Upgrade|Upgraded|2}} except by {{C|Armaments||2}}, the {{R|Toxic Egg||2}}, or {{R|Bone Tea||2}}.

== Trivia ==
* {{C|Luminesce||2}} is similar to {{C|Miracle}} from Slay the Spire 1, but it gives 1 extra {{Icon|CE|2}}.

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Luminesce to the game.
